title: bus.rs: LocalBus channel capacity of 1024 is explicit and documented — keep it
description: MessageBus::local() creates a broadcast channel with capacity 1024. This is explicit and carries a comment explaining it. A future contributor might suggest removing the cap or making it configurable. The cap should stay: an unbounded broadcast channel can cause unbounded memory growth if any subscriber is slow (tokio::broadcast silently drops for Lagged but unbuffered accumulation before the first receiver is created could still grow). 1024 is a reasonable default for a single-process relay.
